titleStmt.title: SII 16.217: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 217. (A.R. No. 701 of 1922.) HAṀPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On both sides of the entrance into a ruined temple of Vishṇu near the Kōdaṇḍarāmasvāmin temple.
The record is dated in Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Kārtika śu. 12, Friday corresponding to 1556 A.D., October 15, Thursday (not Friday).

It records the obeisance of the merchant Tirumaḷa-śeṭṭi, son of Pāpi-śeṭṭi and Pāṭamma and grandson of Appi-śeṭṭi of Kōdaṇḍaṛishi-gōtra to god Veṅkaṭēśa residing at the Chakra-tīrtha. An ashṭaka describing the deity in his Matsya, Kūrma, Varāha, Nārasiṁha, Vāmana, Paraśurāma and Kōdaṇḍarāma incarnations is appended to the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1478 Agunēṭi nala saṁvatsara
kā¨rttika śudha 12 śu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rāja
paramē(śva)ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāya
lu pṛdhvīrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu kōdaṁḍaruṣi gō
traṁ Appiśeṭṭigāri pautruḍaina pāpiśeṭṭigāri dhaṁ
¨rmapatni pāṭamagāru komāruḍu tirumaḷaśeṭṭi sēva .
śubamastu . saṁrakṣituṁ tirumalābhita(dha) vaiśva(śya)va(va)ryaṁ
hitvā phaṇīśvaragiriṁ sahavā¨rdhiputryā(tryā)ṁ prābtaṁ(ptaṁ)khagādhi
patināpi ca tuṁgabhadrāṁ śrīcakratī¨rthranilayaṁ bhaja veṁkka
ṭēśaṁ . 1 . vēdān paraiḥpramuṣitāṁścaturō vicētuṁ . mā
śyaṁ(tsya) vapuḥ śu(su)lalitaṁ pratidhārayaṁttaṁ . Ālōlitā payōTwo syllables are wanting here to make up the metre. Readpṛthupayōnithi .
nidhivāripūraṁ śrīcakratī¨rthanilayaṁ bhaja veṁkaṭēśaṁ [. 2 .*] pāthō
dhi maṁthrana kṛtastridaśairaśēṣaiḥ pāthōnidhau nihita maṁdaraśai
lavaryaṁ . bha¨rtuṁ punarvihita kacchaparājavēṣaṁ śrīcakratī¨rddha
nilayaṁ bhaja veṁkaṭēśaṁ . 3 . śauryātirēka śakalīkṛtavaṁdya
raśyā daityādhipaśva hananāyahamahaṁ ca magnāṁ . vaddhuThis half of the verse is defective.
¨rta mā¨rjita varāhavapu¨rvviśēṣaṁ . śrīcakratī¨rthranilayaṁ Read uddha¨rttuṁ
bhaja veṁkkaṭēśaṁ . 4 . pitrānijēna ku¨rpāparipīḍya�naṁ Read kupitēna nipīḍyamānaṁ .
prahlādamēva parirakṣitumātmabhaktaṁ . staṁbhādvini¨rggataṁ The anusvara is redundant.
tanuṁ naraśiṁhvarūpaṁ . śrīcakratī¨rddhanilayaṁ
bhaja veṁkkaṭēśaṁ [. 5*] . Ākramyassa(sa)rvajagatī nuti
tyaṁ vidhiṁ cchalayituṁ
valaya javāṭi Readbaliyaṅñavāṭyāṁ .
Ādāya vā
mana tanuṁ
jita ssa(sa)rva
lōkaṁ . śrī
cakratī¨rddhanila
yaṁbhaja veṁkka
ṭēśaṁ [. 6 .*] śrī

ṁ vunmā¨rgayēva caritā(ta)ṁ pṛthivīpatīnā mutpāṭa
nāya janitaṁ jamadagnivaṁśē . pāpīyasāṁ paraśu ni
¨rjita kā¨rtakā¨rta vīryaṁ . śrīcakratī¨rtthanilayaṁ bhaja veṁkkaṭēśaṁ [. 7 .*] The word kā¨rta repeated for a second time is redundant.
rakṣaḥpralaṁba purayūthakalin vijētuṁ k�ptāvatāra makhilai
rabhivaṁdyamānaṁ . kōdaṁḍarāma halabhṛnkali kalkirūpaṁ śrīRead bhṛtkali .
cakratī¨rthanilayaṁ bhaja veṁkaṭēśaṁ [. 8 .*] śrī veṁkaṭāṣṭakamidaṁ pri
yamīśvarasya yōvāparēllikhati pṛcchati bhaktiyuktaḥ . dārai ssu
taissakhalu viṁdati dī¨rghamāyuratyāṁ śriyamupaiti vidhūTwo syllables are wanting here to complete the verse metrically.
tarōgaḥ . śrī . tirumalavaṇigīṁdraṁ rakṣituṁ tuṁgabhadrāṁ taṭabhu The record stops abruptly here.
Digital edition of SII 16.217 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
